---
title: "Marketing Spend on Customer Purchase Behaviour"
author: "Siyuan Yin 32876794"
format:
  html: default
  pdf: default
execute: 
  echo: false
  message: false
  warning: false
---

```{r}
#｜label: setup
#｜include：false
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
library(here)
marketing_raw_data<-read.csv(here("data/32876793_SiyuanYin.csv"))
```
